case_title: JENNA ZHANG ET AL VS. JOHN YEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT JENNA ZHANG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT MITSUNORI MORIMOTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHN YEE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER BONNIE YEE. THE NON-COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATHS BY COURT CLERK: R .SAHATJIAN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFFS/CROSS DEFENDANTS. THE PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURUANT TO CCP.116.850 FILED BY DEFENDANT YEE, JOHN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YEE, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ZHANG, JENNA MORIMOTO, MITSUNORI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,344.00 FILED BY ZHANG, JENNA MORIMOTO, MITSUNORI AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT JENNA ZHANG IS PRESENT. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, JENNA MORIMOTO, MITSUNORI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEE, JOHN $107.50 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $222.50, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS JENNA ZHANG AND MITSUNORI MORIMOTO JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY.
